name: regression-cli-daemon-preflight
description: Verify unknown CLI flags do not launch the daemon, hub CLI commands route, -d is registered, and --update refuses dirty trees safely.

steps.title: Unknown command should not run daemon preflight

steps.pattern: daemon startup failed|falling back to single-process mode
steps.description: Unknown command does not launch daemon first

steps.title: Hub CLI command should be recognized

steps.description: Hub status is recognized without daemon preflight failure

steps.title: -d alias and explicit update command are registered

steps.command: PATH="$PWD/.venv/bin:$PATH" bash -lc 'kollab --hub stop all >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; kollab -d 2>&1; sleep 4; kollab --hub status 2>&1; kollab --hub stop all >/dev/null 2>&1 || true'
steps.description: Launch detached via short alias and inspect hub status
-d launches without command or daemon errors

steps.pattern: Refusing to update because the working tree has local changes
steps.description: Update command is safe by default
